subject: Two figures in a dramatic confrontation — a smaller green Namekian figure appears to be struck or overcome while a larger figure looms above
suspected_ip: Piccolo and/or Nail (Dragon Ball Z — Frieza Saga sacrifice scene)
description: Two figures occupy the frame in a tense, dramatic scene. A smaller green-skinned humanoid figure is positioned in the lower foreground — crouching, collapsed, or being struck. A larger, more dominant figure looms in the upper portion of the frame, visually overpowering the smaller one. The palette is dark with orange and green energy accents. The smaller figure's posture reads as wounded or overwhelmed, contrasting with the imposing stance of the figure above. The composition creates a vertical power imbalance — the defeated below, the dominant above. The mood is grim and sacrificial, matching the card's title.
foreground: small green humanoid figure collapsed or struck in lower frame
background: larger looming figure above, dark energy tones
emotion: anguish and defeat — collapsed figure reads as suffering, dominant figure looms without mercy
